app.title: Internal Dashboard
app.description: This is the internal frontend of your BitSwan Internal App. It is protected by OAuth2 — only employees authorized through the BitSwan Automation Operation Center can access it. Use this dashboard to build secure internal tools for your company.
userInfo.title: User Info
tokenInfo.title: Token Info
counter.title: Your Count
counter.description: Click the button to increment your personal counter (stored in PostgreSQL).
gallery.title: Image Gallery
gallery.description: Upload images to the shared gallery (stored in MinIO). These images are also visible on the external frontend.
